info.name: AMC RFP & Portfolio Insight Orchestrator (Phase 01 - DEV)
info.description: Requests for the FastAPI layer (Milestone 8) of the AMC RFP & Portfolio Insight Orchestrator. Start the server first with `uv run python -m amc_orchestrator.main`. See docs/user_guide.md for full context - in particular, DEV runs on CPU-only Ollama, so the RFP requests can take 5-20+ minutes to respond; raise your Postman request timeout accordingly (Settings > General > Request timeout in ms, or set to 0 for no timeout).

request.description: Liveness check. Should always respond quickly with {"status": "ok", "environment": "dev"} regardless of Ollama/graph state.

item.name: RFP - Low Risk (INC2 fixed income query)

request.description: A calm, low-risk query. Should typically complete in one compliance_check pass with a full client report. Expect {"succeeded": true, "escalated": false, "graph_status": "completed", ...} - though a known DEV-only Ollama limitation (see docs/architecture.md) can occasionally cause an escalation instead; that is still a valid 200 response, not an error.

item.name: RFP - High Risk (SMC3 guarantee bait, exercises the compliance loop)

request.description: A deliberate 'guarantee it will continue' bait question about the volatile SMC3 fund. Should trigger at least one compliance_check -> revise_draft -> compliance_check cycle (compliance_attempts >= 2 on success) and the final response_text must never contain guarantee/promise/risk-free language - see docs/compliance_rubric.md and tests/integration/test_smc3_high_risk.py.
Demonstrates request validation: an empty question is rejected with 422 before the graph is ever invoked.
